Bash(python3 -c "
import csv

with open\('/Users/erikjohnsen/Downloads/attentio - Artiklers - 64a7cfb0714138ca49e0622d.csv', newline='', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader\(f\)
    rows = list\(reader\)

for r in rows:
    print\('NAME:', r['Name']\)
    print\('SLUG:', r['Slug']\)
    print\('AUTHOR_REF:', r['Author-reference']\)
    print\('FORFATTER:', r['Forfatter']\)
    print\('MAIN_IMG:', r['Main Image'][:80] if r['Main Image'] else 'NONE'\)
    print\('THUMBNAIL:', r['Thumbnail image'][:80] if r['Thumbnail image'] else 'NONE'\)
    print\('SUMMARY:', r['Post Summary'][:100]\)
    print\('H1:', r['h1-tittel']\)
    print\('---'\)
")
